# Amethyst — DaisyUI Theme
> A deep indigo/purple DaisyUI theme inspired by amethyst crystals, with an amber accent for warmth. Provides light and dark variants, compatible with DaisyUI v4 (JS config) and v5 (CSS @plugin), plus CDN usage.

**Important notes for agents:**
- Package name: `@jswork/daisyui-theme-amethyst`
- Requires `daisyui >= 4` as a peer dependency
- Two theme variants: `amethyst` (light) and `amethyst_dark` (dark)
- All colors use oklch color space in v5 CSS, hex in v4 JS objects
- No runtime dependencies

## Installation

```bash
npm install @jswork/daisyui-theme-amethyst
```

## Usage

### DaisyUI v5 (Tailwind CSS v4)

```css
@import "tailwindcss";
@plugin "daisyui";
@import "@jswork/daisyui-theme-amethyst/amethyst.css";
@import "@jswork/daisyui-theme-amethyst/amethyst-dark.css";
```

### DaisyUI v4 (JS config)

```js
import { amethyst, amethyst_dark } from '@jswork/daisyui-theme-amethyst';

export default {
  plugins: [require("daisyui")],
  daisyui: { themes: [amethyst, amethyst_dark] },
};
```

### CDN

```html
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://unpkg.com/@jswork/daisyui-theme-amethyst/themes/amethyst.css" />
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://unpkg.com/@jswork/daisyui-theme-amethyst/themes/amethyst-dark.css" />
```

## Dark Mode

```html
<html data-theme="amethyst">       <!-- light -->
<html data-theme="amethyst_dark">  <!-- dark -->
```

Or use a DaisyUI theme controller:

```html
<input type="checkbox" class="theme-controller" value="amethyst_dark" />
```

## Theme Colors

### Light — amethyst

| Token | Hex | oklch | Token | Hex | oklch |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| primary | #6366f1 | oklch(55% 0.28 270) | primary-content | #ffffff | oklch(98% 0 0) |
| secondary | #a855f7 | oklch(65% 0.25 300) | secondary-content | #ffffff | oklch(98% 0 0) |
| accent | #f59e0b | oklch(80% 0.2 85) | accent-content | #1a1a1a | oklch(20% 0.04 85) |
| neutral | #374151 | oklch(35% 0.03 260) | neutral-content | #f9fafb | oklch(98% 0 0) |
| base-100 | #ffffff | oklch(100% 0 0) | base-content | #1f2937 | oklch(20% 0.04 260) |
| base-200 | #f3f4f6 | oklch(96% 0.01 260) | | | |
| base-300 | #e5e7eb | oklch(92% 0.02 260) | | | |
| info | #3b82f6 | oklch(65% 0.2 250) | info-content | #ffffff | oklch(98% 0 0) |
| success | #22c55e | oklch(60% 0.22 145) | success-content | #ffffff | oklch(98% 0 0) |
| warning | #eab308 | oklch(80% 0.2 85) | warning-content | #1a1a1a | oklch(20% 0.04 85) |
| error | #ef4444 | oklch(60% 0.25 25) | error-content | #ffffff | oklch(98% 0 0) |

### Dark — amethyst_dark

| Token | Hex | oklch | Token | Hex | oklch |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| primary | #818cf8 | oklch(70% 0.18 270) | primary-content | #1e1b4b | oklch(20% 0.08 270) |
| secondary | #c084fc | oklch(72% 0.2 300) | secondary-content | #1e1b4b | oklch(20% 0.08 270) |
| accent | #fbbf24 | oklch(85% 0.18 85) | accent-content | #1a1a1a | oklch(20% 0.04 85) |
| neutral | #6b7280 | oklch(50% 0.02 260) | neutral-content | #f9fafb | oklch(98% 0 0) |
| base-100 | #1f2937 | oklch(25% 0.03 260) | base-content | #f3f4f6 | oklch(95% 0.01 260) |
| base-200 | #111827 | oklch(18% 0.03 260) | | | |
| base-300 | #0f172a | oklch(14% 0.04 260) | | | |
| info | #60a5fa | oklch(72% 0.16 250) | info-content | #1e3a5f | oklch(25% 0.08 250) |
| success | #4ade80 | oklch(75% 0.2 145) | success-content | #14532d | oklch(25% 0.1 145) |
| warning | #facc15 | oklch(85% 0.18 85) | warning-content | #422006 | oklch(25% 0.1 50) |
| error | #f87171 | oklch(70% 0.2 25) | error-content | #450a0a | oklch(25% 0.1 25) |

## Design Variables

Both theme variants share these design configuration values:

| Variable | Value | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `--radius-selector` | 0.75rem | Border radius for selectors (checkbox, radio, etc.) |
| `--radius-field` | 0.5rem | Border radius for form fields (input, select, textarea) |
| `--radius-box` | 0.75rem | Border radius for card-like components |
| `--size-selector` | 0.25rem | Selector size modifier |
| `--size-field` | 0.25rem | Field size modifier |
| `--border` | 1px | Border width |
| `--depth` | 1 | Shadow depth level |
| `--noise` | 0 | Background noise texture |

v4 JS config also includes: `--rounded-box`, `--rounded-btn`, `--rounded-badge`, `--animation-btn`, `--animation-input`, `--btn-text-case`, `--btn-focus-scale`, `--border-btn`.

## File Structure

```
packages/theme/
├── src/index.js          # v4 theme objects (hex colors + design vars)
├── themes/
│   ├── amethyst.css      # v5 CSS @plugin for light theme
│   └── amethyst-dark.css # v5 CSS @plugin for dark theme
├── build.js              # Build script (generates dist/ for v4 + CDN)
└── package.json
```

### Exports

| Path | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `@jswork/daisyui-theme-amethyst` | v4 JS objects (ESM + CJS) |
| `@jswork/daisyui-theme-amethyst/amethyst.css` | v5 CSS @plugin (light) |
| `@jswork/daisyui-theme-amethyst/amethyst-dark.css` | v5 CSS @plugin (dark) |

## DaisyUI Component Compatibility

This theme is fully compatible with all DaisyUI components. The color tokens map to component modifier classes as follows:

| Token | Component color classes |
|---|---|
| primary | `btn-primary`, `alert-primary`, `badge-primary`, `progress-primary`, etc. |
| secondary | `btn-secondary`, `alert-secondary`, `badge-secondary`, `progress-secondary`, etc. |
| accent | `btn-accent`, `alert-accent`, `badge-accent`, `progress-accent`, etc. |
| neutral | `btn-neutral`, `alert-neutral`, `badge-neutral`, `progress-neutral`, etc. |
| info | `alert-info`, `badge-info`, `progress-info`, `status-info`, etc. |
| success | `alert-success`, `badge-success`, `progress-success`, `status-success`, etc. |
| warning | `alert-warning`, `badge-warning`, `progress-warning`, `status-warning`, etc. |
| error | `alert-error`, `badge-error`, `progress-error`, `status-error`, etc. |

- [GitHub](https://github.com/afeiship/daisyui-theme-amethyst)
